Package org.assertj.core.api

Class SpliteratorAssert<ELEMENT>

java.lang.Object
org.assertj.core.api.AbstractAssert<SELF,Spliterator<ELEMENT>>
org.assertj.core.api.AbstractSpliteratorAssert<SpliteratorAssert<ELEMENT>,ELEMENT>
org.assertj.core.api.SpliteratorAssert<ELEMENT>
Type Parameters:
ELEMENT - the type of elements.
All Implemented Interfaces:
Assert<SpliteratorAssert<ELEMENT>,Spliterator<ELEMENT>>, Descriptable<SpliteratorAssert<ELEMENT>>, ExtensionPoints<SpliteratorAssert<ELEMENT>,Spliterator<ELEMENT>>
public class SpliteratorAssert<ELEMENT> extends AbstractSpliteratorAssert<SpliteratorAssert<ELEMENT>,ELEMENT>
Assertion methods for Spliterators.

To create a new instance of this class, invoke Assertions.assertThat(Spliterator).

Author:
William Bakker
